title: Zero In® All-Weather Ant Bait Stations – Twinpack, Dual Action Gel Ant Killer for Outdoor Use, Safely Enclosed, Kills Ant Nests, Ready-to-Use, Weather-Resistant
features: DUAL ACTION GEL FORMULA: Attracts and kills ants with a powerful gel that targets the entire colony. The gel is highly attractive to ants, ensuring they carry the bait back to the nest
ALL-WEATHER RESISTANT: Designed to withstand various weather conditions, making them perfect for outdoor use. The enclosed design protects the bait from rain, sun, and other environmental factors
SAFE: Each bait station is securely enclosed to prevent accidental contact with pets and children, ensuring safe use around your home and garden
READY-TO-USE: No preparation needed. Simply place the bait stations where ant activity is observed for effective control
EFFECTIVE ANT CONTROL: Kills ants and destroys entire nests, preventing future infestations, providing control for up to 90 days
